summary: FPV drones were used to kill two Russian soldiers on motorcycles assaulting Ukrainian positions, and another Russian soldier who pretended to surrender before fleeing was later killed by FPV drones. In Krasny Liman, an FAB-3000 bomb with a UMPK guidance kit struck a Ukrainian drone launch point. The "Elka" anti-aircraft drone performed a kinetic intercept of a Ukrainian strike UAV at approximately 1,300 meters, with the enemy UAV detonating upon collision. Over border areas, Russian-controlled "Gerbera" drones dropped fake money with QR codes as a PSYOP tactic.
